---
title: Dedupe
description: Deduplicate concurrent get calls for the same key.
icon: Copy
---

When multiple callers read the same key at the same time, only one request reaches the adapter — the rest share the same in-flight promise. This prevents cache stampedes under high concurrency.

## Setup

```ts
import { dedupePlugin } from "@justwant/cache/plugins/dedupe";
import { createCache } from "@justwant/cache";
import { redisAdapter } from "@justwant/cache/adapters/redis";

const cache = createCache({
  adapter: redisAdapter({ redis }),
  plugins: [dedupePlugin()],
});
```

## Behavior

- Only `get` calls are deduplicated. `set` and `delete` are unaffected.
- The in-flight map is **module-level** — it is shared across all `createCache` instances that use this plugin in the same process.
- Once a request completes (success or error), the key is removed from the in-flight map and the next call will start a new request.

## Notes

- `dedupePlugin` takes no options.
- If the underlying `get` throws, all waiters receive the same error.
